channel.title: Hardware on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Hardware on jamesm.blog

item.title: DGX Spark vs Mac Studio: Which Personal AI Supercomputer Should You Buy?
item.description: An in-depth comparison of NVIDIA DGX Spark and Apple Mac Studio for local LLM inference. Includes specifications, pricing, performance benchmarks, and cost analysis to help you choose the right personal AI supercomputer.

item.title: Hardware Sequencers in 2026: When Physical Beats Software
item.description: In an era of AI-generated melodies and infinite DAW power, the physical hardware sequencer has transitioned from a niche tool to a vital mental anchor for the modern producer.
